channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL concussion protocol was followed when Bills QB Josh Allen was evaluated in Houston, league says
item.description: The NFL and its players association said Friday the required steps were followed when Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen was evaluated for a concussion last week at Houston and cleared to return to the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants' Malik Nabers faces backlash after he was spotted at concert following concussion diagnosis
item.description: Malik Nabers has quickly emerged as one of the New York Giants' biggest stars. But the wide receiver recently suffered a head injury during a game against the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tigers ace Skubal gets start as Detroit faces Cleveland in Game 5 winner-gets-Yankees ALDS matchup
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Tarik Skubal's itching to have another emotional October outburst that makes Tigers fans roar — even if it embarrasses his mom.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB spring training facilities spared extensive damage from Hurricane Milton
item.description: Major League Baseball spring training facilities on Florida’s west coast appear to have been mostly spared major damage during Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Inman: 10 things that caught my eye in 49ers’ big win at Seattle
item.description: Rookies excelled but so did the trusted connection between Brock Purdy and George Kittle, not to mention Deebo Samuel and the run defense in Seattle on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NFL great believes panic in Jets’ organization played a role in Robert Saleh’s firing
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer and Green Bay Packers legend LeRoy Butler says panic in the New York Jets organization led to the firing of head coach Robert Saleh.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers: How to watch decisive Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: With the National League Division Series between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers tied at 2-2, it's win or go home for the Friars as they head up north for a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Adam Svensson made a 35-foot eagle putt he thought he had missed and closed with a birdie from the bunker for a career-best 11-under 60, giving him a two-shot lead Thursday in the Black Desert Championship as the PGA Tour returned to Utah for the first time in 61 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 22-time Grand Slam champion Rafael Nadal will retire from tennis after next month's Davis Cup finals
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Rafael Nadal is retiring from professional tennis at age 38, he announced Thursday, after winning 22 Grand Slam titles — 14 at the French Open — during an unprecedented era he shared with rivals Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI and HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers pitcher reportedly robbed of luxury watch at Southern California racetrack
item.description: Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler was reportedly robbed of a luxury watch at a horse racing track in what appeared to be a grand theft spree perpetrated by multiple organized groups.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Bedard, Blackhawks embark on 2024-25 season Tuesday night in Utah
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard was one of the first players on the ice Monday. He was also one of the last to leave when practice was over. In many ways, Bedard is the same guy as he begins his second season with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
